utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: That kid really kicked me hard on the plane .

emotion_cause.span: 1_That kid really kicked me hard on the plane .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well you did pull his hair .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: I am not getting into this again !

emotion_cause.span: 4_I am not getting into this again !

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Okay ! Oh God , you know what ? It is really bad .

utterances.speaker: Chandler
utterances.text: Well , I told you not to walk . Here . There . Okay .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: This does not mean anything , does it ?
